feature_hypothesis: An AI assistant that automatically summarises customer support tickets and suggests responses to agents.

personas.first_reaction: This could streamline our support process, but we need to assess the risks and integration with existing systems.
objections: How will the AI handle complex or nuanced issues?
What is the data security and privacy plan for customer support data?
personas.key_quote: We must ensure this AI solution aligns with our compliance standards and doesn't compromise customer trust.

personas.first_reaction: This could save us time and improve our response quality.
objections: I need to see how it integrates with our current system.
What is the cost, and will it really save us money in the long run?
personas.key_quote: If this tool can enhance our efficiency and cut costs, I’m all in.

personas.first_reaction: This could save me a lot of time and help me respond faster.
objections: I worry about the accuracy of the summaries.
Will it be easy to integrate into our existing system?
personas.key_quote: If it streamlines our workflow and makes support quicker, I'm all in!

personas.first_reaction: I'm concerned about potential data leakage and security risks with customer data.
objections: AI could inadvertently expose sensitive customer information.
There may be compliance issues with data handling.
personas.key_quote: We need to prioritize data security before implementing any new features.

personas.first_reaction: This could be helpful, but we need to address potential PII and compliance risks.
objections: Automated responses may lead to misinterpretation of sensitive data.
We need to ensure we are not violating GDPR regulations regarding data processing.
personas.key_quote: We must prioritize compliance and assess all potential risks before moving forward.

personas.first_reaction: This feature could significantly boost our efficiency in handling support tickets!
objections: Potential inaccuracies in AI suggestions could lead to incorrect responses.
Training the AI might require additional time and resources.
personas.key_quote: If we can leverage AI to reduce response times, we can enhance customer satisfaction tremendously!
